channel.title: Counter-Terrorism on The Security Gazette
channel.description: Recent content in Counter-Terrorism on The Security Gazette

item.title: CCTV for Airports and Transport Hubs — National Security Standards UK 2026
item.description: Comprehensive guide to CCTV at UK airports and transport hubs: DfT compliance, terminal coverage, baggage hall security, car park surveillance, and counter-terrorism requirements.
